mission: Combine OutsideCubaseHub seed with Swift Cubase archive browser as Niko Music Hub
authoritative_order_note: Task queue executor_order overrides rename-first ordering in docs/niko-music-hub-composer-execution-plan.md Step 4

gates.commit: green local state only; no push unless asked

critic_patches: 2026-05-25: slice 01 fixture generator + Second Song + test-quality rules
2026-05-25: slice 03 ranker scope narrowed to v0.1 subset
2026-05-25: slices 07/11 mandatory CLI E2E hook (no pgrep-only)

slices.title: Cubase fixtures + NikoMusicCore package skeleton
acceptance: script/fixtures/generate_cubase_archive_fixtures.sh creates Neon Hook, Second Song (instr vs mix competing previews), and Broken Folder Example
WAV fixtures are minimal valid audio; CPR fixtures may be zero-byte placeholders with README note (no MacBook real project copy)
NikoMusicCore target builds with domain types and path safety helpers
PathSafety rejects paths outside declared roots
ReadOnlyArchivePolicy write-probe under fixture root fails closed
New NikoMusicCoreTests must not use String(contentsOf:) source string inspection
test_quality_rules: No source.contains / source file reads in new archive tests
Assert filesystem and domain outputs only
slices.commit_message_hint: Add Cubase fixtures and NikoMusicCore skeleton with path safety

slices.title: One-folder-one-song scanner and CPR detection
acceptance: Scanning fixture root yields one Song per immediate child folder
Neon Hook has >=1 CPR; Broken Folder Example produces scan warning, no CPR main
latestCPR selects max modification date, not filename version number
slices.commit_message_hint: Implement Cubase archive scanner and CPR version detection

slices.title: Preview candidate detection and confidence ranking
acceptance: Detects wav/mp3/m4a/aiff/flac under Mixdown and song root
Neon Hook main preview prefers Mixdown full mix over stems/instrumental names
Second Song prefers full mix filename over instr stem when both exist
Negative filename tokens demote candidates (v0.1 subset: role + folder + filename + recency only)
Defer duration parsing, chorus start, and version-number tiebreaks
slices.commit_message_hint: Add preview detection and confidence ranking

slices.title: Search index and read-only CPR opener
acceptance: Search finds Neon Hook by title and by mixdown filename
MusicItemOpener dry-run records path without NSWorkspace.open
Non-dry-run path uses NSWorkspace (unit-tested via injectable opener port)
slices.commit_message_hint: Add music search index and dry-run-safe CPR opener

slices.title: NikoMusicCoreSelfTest CLI for fixture and real-root smoke
acceptance: swift run NikoMusicCoreSelfTest scans default fixture path and prints song/cpr/preview counts
Flags: --fixture-root, --real-root, --read-only
script/ci.sh runs self-test when target exists
slices.fixture_e2e: CLI prints Neon Hook in fixture counts
slices.real_archive_smoke: Read-only mode prints counts; verifies zero writes under archive root (temp probe file test optional)
slices.commit_message_hint: Add NikoMusicCoreSelfTest CLI for fixture and read-only scans

slices.title: Rename package, app target, bundle, and Application Support paths
acceptance: Commit A: Package.swift + target/directory rename only; ./script/ci.sh green
Commit B: Application Support paths, build scripts, bundle id; ./script/ci.sh green again
swift build produces NikoMusicHub executable
dist/NikoMusicHub.app builds via build_and_run.sh
All pre-rename tests pass (same skip list for recorder)
No drive-by refactors in feature modules
tests: Full swift test with documented skips
slices.commit_message_hint: Rename OutsideCubaseHub package and app to Niko Music Hub

slices.title: FeatureArchiveBrowser module and ToolFeature registration
acceptance: archive-browser feature registers first in ToolRegistry
AppShellView default selection is archive-browser (not wav-converter)
Placeholder view renders without crashing
ArchiveSmokeCommands exposes env-driven fixture scan/search/open for automation (no UI required)
slices.commit_message_hint: Add archive browser feature skeleton and registry wiring

slices.title: Browse list, search, and root selection UI
acceptance: User can add/remove scan roots via NSOpenPanel
Scan button runs CubaseArchiveScanner on selected roots
Search field filters fixture songs live
Dark editorial tokens applied (background, surface, accent)
slices.fixture_e2e: planned — launch app, select fixture root env, see Neon Hook card
slices.commit_message_hint: Implement archive browse, search, and root selection UI

slices.title: Song detail, preview playback, CPR version list
acceptance: Detail shows all CPR versions sorted by date
Main preview plays via AVPlayer
Waveform area present (bar or placeholder per DESIGN_SYSTEM)
Selecting song from list navigates to detail
slices.fixture_e2e: Neon Hook detail shows preview + CPR filenames
slices.commit_message_hint: Add song detail view with preview playback

slices.title: Open latest CPR with dry-run mode for tests
acceptance: Open Latest button calls MusicItemOpener
NIKO_MUSIC_HUB_DRY_RUN_OPEN=1 logs expected Neon Hook.cpr path
Reveal in Finder action available as secondary
slices.fixture_e2e: Trigger open; assert dry-run log line matches fixture CPR path
slices.commit_message_hint: Wire open latest CPR with dry-run support for automation

slices.title: Implement e2e_user_smoke.sh fixture launch path
acceptance: e2e builds NikoMusicHub.app
Resets test Application Support directory
Runs ArchiveSmokeCommands or app --e2e-smoke with NIKO_MUSIC_HUB_FIXTURE_ROOT and NIKO_MUSIC_HUB_DRY_RUN_OPEN=1
Asserts stdout/log contains Neon Hook and fixture CPR path (dry-run)
pgrep-only success is forbidden
osascript/accessibility is optional supplement, not the sole gate
./script/e2e_user_smoke.sh exits 0
slices.fixture_e2e: Full user path: launch → fixture root → search Neon Hook → open latest dry-run
slices.commit_message_hint: Add fixture-based user E2E smoke script

slices.title: Document and verify real-archive read-only smoke
acceptance: docs/user-e2e.md documents real-root command with Niko-provided path placeholder
Self-test read-only mode completes without writing under scanned root
ReadOnlyArchivePolicyTests write-probe covers real-root policy semantics
Manual smoke checklist recorded in docs
slices.real_archive_smoke: Operator runs against real Cubase archive; counts only; zero writes in archive tree

slices.title: README, user docs, dev-tool default cleanup
acceptance: README describes build, test, e2e, fixture layout
Dev tool not default; optional keep for diagnostics
All gates green: ci.sh + e2e_user_smoke.sh
slices.commit_message_hint: Polish docs and finalize v0.1 dev-tool defaults

critic_checklist: No file writes under Fixtures/ or user archive paths in tests (write-probe must fail closed)
Fixtures generated via script; no MacBook real CPR/WAV copy
Rename slice preserves 154-test baseline (two commits in slice 06)
E2E asserts dry-run log content, not pgrep-only
ArchiveSmokeCommands or equivalent CLI required before v0.1 done
New archive tests: no String(contentsOf:) source inspection
v0.1 ranker subset only; no JSON archive cache
No LOCUS_* env or locus paths in scripts
CI skip list for recorder unchanged unless justified
